name: Boudin (Festival)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place water, boneless pork, and pork liver in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat to medium and simmer until the pork is tender.
4. Remove the pork and liver from the stock.
5. Grind the pork and liver using a food processor if desired.
6. Add onion, green onion, and other seasonings to the stock.
7. Cook until the onions are tender.
8. Add the ground meat to the vegetable-stock mixture.
9. Cook until most of the water has evaporated.
10. Stir in cooked rice. Adjust seasonings as desired.
11. Stuff the rice-meat mixture into sausage casings.
12. Prick the casings 3-4 times each to prevent bursting during cooking.
13. Cook boudin in simmering water for 12 minutes.
14. Remove from water and serve.
